zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo於大約1185年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾時，他的父親Sir William Warwicksire de Cantilupe36歲，母親Mesceline or Sibilla Braci24歲。他於大約1210年與Millicent Gournay在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1239年被列為king's high steward。他去世於1251年2月22日在英國巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波洛享年67歲，埋葬在英國奧可福爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo于大约1185年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾时，他的父亲Sir William Warwicksire de Cantilupe36岁，母亲Mesceline or Sibilla Braci24岁。他于大约1210年与Millicent Gournay在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1239年被列为king's high steward。他去世于1251年2月22日在英国巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波洛享年67岁，埋葬在英国奧可福爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo was born about 1185, in Buckinghamshire, England, his father, Sir William Warwicksire de Cantilupe, was 36 and his mother, Mesceline or Sibilla Braci, was 24. He married Millicent Gournay about 1210, in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. In 1239, at the age of 55, his occupation is listed as king's high steward. He died on 22 February 1251, in Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 67, and was buried in Oxfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo est né environ 1185, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Warwicksire de Cantilupe, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Mesceline or Sibilla Braci, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Millicent Gournay environ 1210, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. En 1239, à l’âge de 55 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est king's high steward. Il est décédé le 22 février 1251, à Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Oxfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo um 1185 in Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Warwicksire de Cantilupe 36 und seine Mutter Mesceline or Sibilla Braci 24. Er hat um 1210 in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom Millicent Gournay geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. 1239, als er 55 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als king's high steward aufgeführt. Er starb am 22. Februar 1251 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, England und wurde in Oxfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo è nato il circa 1185 nel Buckinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Sir William Warwicksire de Cantilupe, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Mesceline or Sibilla Braci, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Millicent Gournay circa 1210, nel Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Nel 1239, all'età di 55 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come king's high steward. Morì il 22 febbraio 1251, nel Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, England, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Oxfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Caunteloが約1185年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir William Warwicksire de Cantilupeは36歳，母Mesceline or Sibilla Braciは24歳であった。約1210年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアでMillicent Gournayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。1239年，55歳の時，職業はking's high stewardと記録されている。彼は1251年2月22日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエレスボロウで67歳で死去し，イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo(이)가 대략 1185년 영국 벅잉함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Warwicksire de Cantilupe(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Mesceline or Sibilla Braci(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1210년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르에서 Millicent Gournay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1239년, 55세의 나이로 그의 직업은 king's high steward이었다. 그는 1251년 2월 22일 영국 벅잉함실르 엘레스버루에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스퍼드실르에 묻혔다.

mn.Leicestershire, England: Ratae Coritanorum, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс
mn.of Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, Englan: Ellesborough, Buccingahamscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo nasceu aproximadamente 1185, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Warwicksire de Cantilupe, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Mesceline or Sibilla Braci, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Millicent Gournay aproximadamente 1210, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Em 1239, com 55 anos, sua profissão aparece como king's high steward. Ele faleceu em 22 de fevereiro de 1251, em Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo родился около 1185 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Warwicksire de Cantilupe было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Mesceline or Sibilla Braci, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Millicent Gournay около 1210 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. В 1239 году, в возрасте 55 лет,  он работал по профессии king's high steward. Он умер 22 февраля 1251 г. в местности эллесбороую, буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности оксфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo nació aproximadamente 1185, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Warwicksire de Cantilupe, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Mesceline or Sibilla Braci, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Millicent Gournay aproximadamente 1210, en Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas. En 1239, a la edad de 55 años, su ocupación registrada era king's high steward. Murió el 22 de febrero de 1251, en Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.
